features.evidence: The combination of the Intel Core Ultra 9 and the RTX 5070 Ti GPU chews through every modern title I've thrown at it without breaking a sweat. The performance is, in a word, staggering.

The 16-inch 2.5K OLED panel is breathtaking. When you crank up settings or use high refresh rates, the i7 + RTX combo keeps fps stable and smooth — no noticeable lag even in hectic firefights or big open-world scenes.
What's equally impressive is the thermal management. the heat is managed so well that the keyboard and typing area remain remarkably comfortable.
Amazing laptop with great specs / price. What truly seals the deal is the incredible value proposition.
If you want great battery life get a Mac Pro or similar. Like most powerful gaming laptops, the battery drains fast if you actually game on battery power.
value: average battery life in hours: 7 Hours

features.evidence: ”Build & convenience: Keyboard and overall build feel sturdy and premium. the heat is managed so well that the keyboard and typing area remain remarkably comfortable.
”Build & convenience: Keyboard and overall build feel sturdy and premium. If you move the machine around a lot (school, cafés, trips) you’ll feel the weight.
Every aspect of the Legion Pro 7i feels premium, from its solid aluminum chassis to the scorching-fast storage.
If I had to pinpoint the one area where a budget-conscious decision was made, it's the plastic trackpad.
I’ve done some lighter tasks, streaming, and even editing-type work (video/audio) and the system handles it like a champ.
I’ve done some lighter tasks, streaming, and even editing-type work (video/audio) and the system handles it like a champ.
Ports, connectivity and cooling seem well-balanced — you can plug in accessories, external drives or headsets without fuss; fans don’t get unbearably loud unless under heavy load.
